title: The Hidden Sources of Spurious Fusion Transcripts in Plants
author: Ling-Ling, Chen
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Reproducible workflows, scripts, and test data for identifying and dissecting spurious fusion transcripts in plants from long-read and short-read RNA sequencing data.
steps_raw: Reproducible workflows, scripts, and test data for identifying and dissecting spurious fusion transcripts in plants from long-read and short-read RNA sequencing data.
